desc: After ticket 081's artifact has passed its separately reviewed tethered single-object rig proof, prepare but do not execute the reversible B0 enrollment/cold-boot procedure: target-volume identity guard, current object backup/hash, exact kmutil --raw entry-point command, boot-picker run, observational-only KIS capture, rollback/recovery, and pass/stop conditions. Do not close 082 before that live proof. Enrollment and cold boot require explicit maintainer approval and may be split. Experiment 7 in docs/BOOTABLE_BUILD_EXPERIMENTS.md.
author: codex
